ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator of the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the experiment */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Research area of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "mechanism_of_action" TEXT /* Mechanism of action of the treatment */,
  "clinical_trial_status" TEXT /* Status of any associated clinical trials */,
  "adverse_effects" TEXT /* Known adverse effects of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perturbagens" (
  "perturbagen_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each perturbagen */,
  "perturbagen_name" TEXT /* Name of the perturbagen */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of perturbagen (e.g., chemical, genetic) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the perturbagen */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the perturbagen used in the experiment */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the perturbagen */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the perturbagen */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the perturbagen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perturbagen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_lines" (
  "cell_line_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "cell_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cell line (e.g., cancer, normal) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the cell line */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Catalog number of the cell line */,
  "passage_number" INTEGER /* Passage number of the cell line */,
  "growth_medium" TEXT /* Growth medium used for the cell line */,
  "growth_conditions" TEXT /* Growth conditions for the cell line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression data record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "perturbagen_id" TEXT /* ID of the perturbagen */,
  "cell_line_id" TEXT /* ID of the cell line */,
  "time_point" TEXT /* Time point of the measurement */,
  "signature_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene expression signature */,
  "source_signature_id" TEXT /* ID of the source gene expression signature */,
  "similarity" REAL /* Similarity score between the gene expression signature and the source signature */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the similarity score */,
  "n_genes" INTEGER /* Number of genes in the gene expression signature */,
  "qc_status" TEXT /* Quality control status of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_source_signature_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_signature_id") REFERENCES source_signatures ("source_signature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_signature_id FOREIGN KEY ("signature_id") REFERENCES gene_signatures ("signature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_perturbagen_id FOREIGN KEY ("perturbagen_id") REFERENCES perturbagens ("perturbagen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_signatures" (
  "signature_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene expression signature */,
  "signature_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene expression signature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene expression signature */,
  "gene_list" TEXT /* List of genes in the signature */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the signature was created */,
  "signature_type" TEXT /* Type of the signature (e.g., upregulated, downregulated) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the signature */,
  "publicly_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the signature is publicly available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_signatures" (
  "source_signature_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each source gene expression signature */,
  "source_signature_name" TEXT /* Name of the source gene expression signature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source gene expression signature */,
  "gene_list" TEXT /* List of genes in the source signature */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the source signature was created */,
  "signature_type" TEXT /* Type of the source signature (e.g., upregulated, downregulated) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the source signature */,
  "publicly_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the source signature is publicly available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_signature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene expression data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gene_expression_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the publication is associated with */,
  "corresponding_author" TEXT /* Corresponding author of the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the principal investigator belongs to */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the principal investigator */,
  "publications_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications associated with the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene expression data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gene_expression_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression sample */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene expression data the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., RNA, DNA) */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sample_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the sample (e.g., patient, cell line) */,
  "sample_purity" REAL /* Purity of the sample */,
  "sample_viability" REAL /* Viability of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_samples_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gene_expression_data ("data_id")
)
